data.title: Reminder for Enovix shareholders: Early warrant expiration at specified price condition.
data.description: In the latest update, it has been reported that the country's GDP grew by 5.2% in the past quarter, showing significant improvement from the previous quarter's growth rate of 3.8%. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.1%, marking a decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.5%. It has also been noted that 250,000 new jobs were created in various sectors, contributing to the overall economic growth. Moreover, the stock market experienced a surge, with the main index increasing by 700 points to reach an all-time high of 30,000 points. These positive developments suggest a promising outlook for the country's economy in the coming months.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP drop as crypto liquidations exceed $900M amidst bearish market conditions.
data.description: In light of various negative political and economic factors, the value of Bitcoin and other assets has decreased significantly. This downturn is compounded by a continued increase in the number of liquidations occurring in the market.

data.title: A Federal Reserve governor is set to resign, allowing Trump to influence central bank. Numbers in play: 1 resignation and pressure to lower interest rates.
data.description: The recent resignation occurred amidst President Trump's public pressure on the central bank to reduce interest rates and his demands for Jerome H. Powell, the chair, to resign.

data.title: Opendoor regains Nasdaq compliance, cancels stockholder meeting. Stock to remain listed on Nasdaq.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Opendoor Technologies Inc. disclosed that it has satisfied Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule and will remain on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the ticker symbol OPEN. Opendoor is a prominent online marketplace for buying and selling residential real estate. This news means that the company's common stock price has met the minimum threshold required by Nasdaq. The successful compliance ensures Opendoor's continued presence on the Nasdaq Global Select Market, offering stability to investors and demonstrating the company's adherence to regulatory standards. This update highlights the resilience and financial health of Opendoor, bolstering confidence in its operations and stock performance.

data.title: NETGEAR granted inducement equity awards to new employees under Nasdaq rule, expanding its talent pool.
data.description: In San Jose, California, NETGEAR, Inc. (Nasdaq: NTGR), a renowned provider of intelligent networking solutions, revealed the issuance of inducement equity awards to fresh recruits spanning various company divisions. These awards were granted under NETGEAR's inducement plan, specifically for offering equity incentives to individuals who were not part of the company before or had a legitimate break in employment with NETGEAR. The awards aim to attract new talent and boost engagement across departments.

data.title: ThredUp (NASDAQ: TDUP) to report an EPS of $-0.06; shares at $8.26, up 389.6% in 52 weeks; past EPS beat by $0.02 resulted in 47.75% price increase last quarter.
data.description: ThredUp is set to release its quarterly earnings report on August 4, 2025, with analysts expecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.06. In the last quarter, the company beat estimates by $0.02, resulting in a 47.75% increase in share price the next day. ThredUp's stock was trading at $8.26 as of July 31, up 389.6% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts are eagerly awaiting the earnings report for potential positive guidance and exceeding estimates, as stock prices can heavily rely on future projections. data.title: LTC Properties (NYSE: LTC) to announce earnings on 08/04 with analysts estimating $1.04 EPS. Shares down 3.08% in 52-weeks. Analysts have a consensus Neutral rating on the company. Market reaction often driven by guidance. Earnings miss in Q1 2025 led to 3.5% share price increase next day. Investors await surpassing estimates & positive guidance. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: LTC Properties (NYSE: LTC) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on 2025-08-04, with analysts predicting an EPS of $1.04. The company recently missed EPS estimates by $0.01 in the last quarter, resulting in a 3.5% increase in share price the following day. Over the past four quarters, LTC Properties has had mixed earnings performances, with price changes ranging from -6.0% to 6.0%. As of July 31, LTC Properties shares were trading at $34.04, down 3.08% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts currently rate the company as Neutral based on 1 rating. Investors are anxiously awaiting the upcoming earnings release to see if LTC Properties exceeds estimates and provides positive guidance for the next quarter. Market reactions often hinge on guidance rather than just earnings performance. Stay informed about industry sentiments to make informed investment decisions.

data.title: Xenon Pharmaceuticals grants 24,200 share options to 6 new employees; approved by Board on July 31, 2025 in compliance with Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Today, Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc., a neuroscience-focused biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as XENE, disclosed granting equity inducements to six new non-officer employees. The inducement includes a total of 24,200 share options, approved by the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors on July 31, 2025. These inducements were considered vital for these employees joining the company and comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Xenon Pharmaceuticals is dedicated to discovering, developing, and delivering life-changing therapeutics for patients in need, with operations in Vancouver, British Columbia, and Boston.

data.title: ThreeD Capital Inc. completes private placement financing with 11.6 million units sold for $696,000 at $0.06 per unit.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. ("ThreeD" or the "Company") completed a private placement financing by issuing 11,600,000 units ("Units") at a price of $0.06 per Unit, resulting in total gross proceeds of $696,000. ThreeD is a Canadian venture capital firm that focuses on making opportunistic investments in companies within the junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors.

data.title: SPY stock provides diversity across 500 stocks in 11 sectors with low expenses, but won't outperform the market.
data.description: Investing in SPY stock guarantees that you will closely track the performance of the S&P 500 index. With a low expense ratio, your investment will be spread across 500 stocks and 11 different sectors, ensuring diversification. However, it is important to note that while you won't fall behind the market, you also won't outperform it. Consider whether SPY stock is a viable investment option for you at this time.
